summary: CQC Compliance Centre upgrade fully tested. All backend endpoints return correct data structures. Frontend displays CQC summary banner, 4 summary cards, missing items panel, and 5 tabs correctly. Staff Compliance tab shows DBS Register, Training, and Staff List cards. Existing policy upload and assignment functionality verified working.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/compliance/centre-summary returns 200
✅ Backend: centre-summary has overall_status field (OK/Needs Attention/Critical)
✅ Backend: centre-summary has policies section with complete/total/missing/due_soon/overdue/required_complete/required_total
✅ Backend: centre-summary has certificates section with valid/total/missing/expiring/expired/required_complete/required_total
✅ Backend: centre-summary has staff_compliance section with total/dbs_valid/dbs_missing/dbs_expiring/training_last_12_months
✅ Backend: centre-summary has missing_items section with required_policies and required_certificates lists
✅ Backend: Missing items have id/name/required/conditional/category fields
✅ Backend: GET /api/compliance/policies returns policies with required/conditional/review_status/assigned_staff_count/last_reviewed_at fields
✅ Backend: GET /api/compliance/insurance returns certificates with category (insurance/regulatory/safety)/required/conditional fields
✅ Backend: Policy assignments endpoint (/api/policy-assignments) works
✅ Backend: Employees endpoint works for assignment functionality
✅ Backend: Dashboard stats and compliance dashboard endpoints work
✅ Frontend: CQC Compliance banner shows overall status (Critical Issues with 19 required items missing)
✅ Frontend: 4 summary cards displayed - Policies Active (6/32), Certificates Valid (1/13), Staff DBS Valid (7/7), Training (7/7)
✅ Frontend: Missing Required Items panel shows both missing policies and certificates with REQUIRED tags
✅ Frontend: 5 tabs present - Policies, Certificates, Staff Compliance, Incidents, Reports
✅ Frontend: Policies tab shows REQUIRED tags and policy categories (Core, Clinical, Operational, Governance)
✅ Frontend: Policies show 'Last:' review date and 'Next review:' date
✅ Frontend: Certificates tab shows category grouping (Insurance, Regulatory, Safety)
✅ Frontend: Certificates show REQUIRED and CONDITIONAL tags
✅ Frontend: Staff Compliance tab shows DBS Register Status card with Valid DBS/Missing DBS/Expiring Soon
✅ Frontend: Staff Compliance tab shows Training (Last 12 Months) card with Staff with Training/No Recent Training
✅ Frontend: Staff Compliance tab shows Staff List Completeness card with Total Active Staff/Work Ready/Pending Compliance
✅ Frontend: Policy assignment dialog opens with employee list and Select All Unassigned option
✅ Frontend: Policy view/preview works with PDF viewer
critical_code_review_comments: Backend centre-summary endpoint at lines 10037-10257 correctly calculates overall_status based on missing policies, certificates, and DBS
Backend policies endpoint returns review_status (current/due_soon/overdue) computed from review_date
Backend certificates have category field (insurance/regulatory/safety) for proper grouping
Frontend CQC Summary UI at lines 529-727 correctly displays overall status banner, 4 summary cards, and missing items panel
Frontend Staff Compliance tab at lines 1222-1390 shows 3 cards: DBS Register, Training, Staff List Completeness
Frontend policies display REQUIRED/CONDITIONAL tags and review status tags (REVIEW OVERDUE/REVIEW DUE) when applicable
context_for_next_testing_agent: CQC Compliance Centre upgrade fully verified. Key features: 1) centre-summary endpoint returns overall_status (OK/Needs Attention/Critical), policies/certificates/staff_compliance sections, and missing_items lists. 2) Policies have required/conditional/review_status/assigned_staff_count/last_reviewed_at fields. 3) Certificates have category (insurance/regulatory/safety)/required/conditional fields. 4) Frontend shows CQC banner, 4 summary cards, missing items panel, and 5 tabs. 5) Staff Compliance tab has 3 cards: DBS Register Status, Training (Last 12 Months), Staff List Completeness. 6) Existing policy upload and assignment functionality still works.
